query: SELECT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM oidc_identities identity JOIN users ON users.id = identity.user_id JOIN sessions session ON session.user_id = users.id WHERE identity.issuer = $1 AND identity.subject = $2 AND users.id = $3 AND users.active AND users.security_version = $5 AND session.id = $4 AND session.security_version = $5 AND session.expires_at > now() ) AS "value!"
